title: A Night in the Superstitions
summary: We stopped at the Peralta Regional Park on our way up to Phoenix to visit Helen's grandparents. We went on a nice hike around the campground and watched 'The Devil Wears Prada' that night. In the morning, we drank coffee and read our books in the sun, then went on a run before hitting the road.

photos.caption: Helen beating Colin at a game of wingspan at the camp picnic table.
A nice view of the mountains visible from camp around sunset.
